name: Maryville Community Center
description: Maryville Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Maryville, MO. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Northwest Missouri State University Student Recreation Center
description: Northwest Missouri State University Student Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Maryville, MO. There are 12 outdoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.
